app_quality_notes: Dark cyberpunk UI with emoji reels. Payout table displayed. Mobile responsive layout. Fixed 10-token bet with 1000 starting tokens. Spin animation and result messages work correctly.
code_quality_notes: Functional JS with async/await for spin timing. Clean state object and separated functions (init updateDisplay spin checkWin resetGame). No bugs found. Good categorized message system.

app_quality_notes: Dark neon cyan theme. Adjustable bet via +/- buttons and input field. Payline indicator and celebration animation. Starts with only 100 tokens. Has mobile responsive CSS (max-width 500px). Two-match win message incorrectly says 50% match bonus (actually 2x bet).
code_quality_notes: OOP class-based (AISlotMachine). Clean constructor with event listeners. animationend cleanup with {once:true}. Bet validation present. Celebration creates floating DOM elements. Two-match payout message is misleading. Well-organized overall.

app_quality_notes: Light/white theme distinct from dark-themed candidates. Shows tokens and total spent and winnings. Has joke box and payout chart. Mobile responsive CSS. Loss incurs extra -10 penalty on top of bet (20 total per loss) making gameplay harsh. Floating token celebration on win.
code_quality_notes: OOP class (AISlotMachine). Win detection via string concatenation of symbols (fragile). Uses setInterval for celebration animation instead of requestAnimationFrame. Extra loss penalty is intentional but punishing. Clean structure with good separation of concerns.

app_quality_notes: Light purple gradient theme. Different symbols per reel (6 each from 18 total). Bet increase/decrease and AI comment box. Keyboard spacebar support. Bug: reel scroll uses 18-symbol index but HTML has only 6 items per reel so reels often scroll to empty/wrong positions. CSS responsive section is incomplete with unclosed braces.
code_quality_notes: Procedural style with clean function separation. Keyboard support and special humor combo detection. Critical bug: 18-symbol JS array vs 6 HTML symbols per reel causes visual-logic mismatch. CSS file has unclosed @media and @keyframes blocks at end.

app_quality_notes: Most unique design with gold/red slot machine. Detailed stats panel and scrollable AI message log. Emoji+text reel labels. Smooth animated reels with easing. Reset requires confirmation. But triple/double match wins are impossible since each reel has completely different symbol sets. No mobile responsive CSS.
code_quality_notes: OOP class using requestAnimationFrame for smooth reel animation with easing. Good UX: message log with auto-scroll and max 10 messages. confirm() on reset. AI combo detection works for cross-reel wins. But triple/double match code is dead code (can never trigger). No CSS responsive media queries. window.game global for debugging left in.
